title: Enna Marandhaen Lyrics Ivan Vera Madhiri Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Enna Marandhaen
Singer(s) : Madhushree
Lyricist : Na.MuthuKumar
Movie: Ivan Vera Mathiri (2013)
Music: Sathya.C

Yaar avano avano
Yaar avano avano
Yaar avano avano
avano ....

Enna marandhaen edharku marandhaen
ennai keteney
unnai ninaithu ennai marandhaen
yellaam marandheney

En perai marandhaen
en oorai marandhaen
en thozhigalai maradhaeney
en nadai marandhaen
en udai marandhaen
en ninaivinai marandhaeney

Andhi malai kovil marandhaen
adhigaalai kolam marandhaen
yen marandhaen ?

Kan thirandhum paarka marandhaen
kaal nadandhum padhai marandhaen
vaai thirandhum pesa marandhaen
naan pan... paadal marandhaen

Dhinam sandai podum thaayidam
kenja marandhaen
en kutti thangai avalidam
konja marandhaen

Padithadhellaam paadhi marandhaen
thervarayil meedhi marandhaen
naal kizhamai thaedhi marandhaen
naan min anjalin sedhi marandhaen

Naan ennai pattri avanidam
solla marandhaen
avan punnagayai moota katti
alla marandhaen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Enna Marandhaen'?

The song expresses feelings of longing and nostalgia, reflecting on memories of love and loss.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Ivan Vera Madhiri'?

In the movie, this song captures the protagonist's emotional turmoil and reminiscence about a past relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Madhusree and composed by Sathya C.

When was 'Enna Marandhaen' released?

The song was released on November 7, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enna Marandhaen, the protagonist reflects on lost love, evoking a deep sense of melancholy and nostalgia. The song's poignant lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, beautifully articulate the pain of forgetting and the memories that linger. Madhusree's soulful rendition adds an emotional layer, making it a perfect fit for moments of heartbreak and introspection. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Marandhaen is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of longing and love, beautifully rendered by Madhusree's enchanting vocals. The collaboration with lyricist Na Muthukumar and music director Sathya C brings a unique depth to this heartfelt song from the film Ivan Vera Madhiri. Experience the emotional journey as the lyrics resonate with anyone who has ever felt the pangs of love lost.
stanzaMeanings: Who is he, who is he, who is he, who is he, who is he...?
I forgot what I forgot, I asked you, thinking of you, I forgot everything.
I forgot my name, I forgot my place, I forgot my friends, I forgot my way, I forgot my belongings, I forgot my memories.
I forgot the temple at dusk, I forgot the decorations, why did I forget?
I forgot to see with my eyes, I forgot the path I walked, I forgot to speak with my mouth, I forgot to sing...
Every day brings fights, I forgot the love of my little sister, I forgot a bit about her.
I forgot, I forgot, what made me forget?
I forgot half of everything I read, I forgot the importance of my decisions, I searched for a delay in the day, I forgot the message of the little angel.
I forgot to tell him about myself, I forgot that he is not a burden to me.
I forgot, I forgot, because of him, I forgot.
